Title: These three features make the Shargeek 300 the definitive 24,000mAh power bank — it's so good I retired my UGREEN power bank
Description:
Sharge has a new power bank, and it is a beast.
The Shargeek 300 has a 24,000mAh battery, two USB-C ports that go up to 140W, and RGB lighting.
The best part? Both ports hit 140W simultaneously, allowing you to charge two notebooks at the same time.
